questions.question: What is the main activity taking place in this clip?
questions.answer_key: People are sledding or sliding down an inflatable snow slide.
questions.rationale: Establishes the primary action and context essential to understanding the scene.

questions.question: What is the setting or location where this activity occurs?
questions.answer_key: A snowy backyard or outdoor residential area with fencing and bare trees.
questions.rationale: Describes the environment necessary for listeners to visualize the scene.

questions.question: What is the main object or equipment used in this activity?
questions.answer_key: A large inflatable slide with white and dark blue sections and tunnel openings.
questions.rationale: Identifies the key apparatus central to the activity being performed.

questions.question: How many people are visible actively using the slide in the frames?
questions.answer_key: At least two to three people are sliding or positioned on the inflatable slide.
questions.rationale: Helps listeners understand the scale of participation in the activity.

questions.question: What distinctive feature does the person in the red jacket wear?
questions.answer_key: A bright red jacket or coat visible at the top of the slide.
questions.rationale: Provides a visual reference point to track movement and identify participants.
